programmes.show_description: A Roger Story: US animated comedy series. Steve and Snot are forced to stop being friends after friction forms between their mothers, so they enlist Roger's help to break the ice.
The Nightmare 2 Days Before Christmas: Animated comedy. The Belchers are forced to spend Christmas at Mr Fischoeder's old hunting lodge when their power goes out.
The (Raccoon) King and I: Animated comedy. When Linda takes to caring for an injured raccoon, she makes a mistake during a neighbourhood block party that could endanger its life.
Uniform: Sitcom set in a fictional police training college. The excited recruits get to wear their uniforms for the first time and Dev reveals a deeply personal issue to Steph.
The Vestal: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Stylax pursues a romance with a Vestal Virgin who guards the city's sacred flame, and Grumio spots a business opportunity involving cheese.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series about the superhero team. As commercials are the only part of the show he likes, Control Freak makes extra advertisements to torment the Titans.
Pearl of My Dreams / Down the Drain / Mech-A-Mess: Animated series. Porky Pig and Daffy Duck dive for pearls, Elmer Fudd has a hunting mishap, and Wile E. Coyote gets a new suit.
Theatre of the Doomed: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. A brand-new theatre production is under threat by a mummified corpse from Mystery Cove's ancient past.
Party Like It's 1899: Animated adventure series. Daphne brings the gang to a Victorian murder mystery party where a headless count is about to start kidnapping people for real!
Screama Donna: Animated adventure series. In order to solve the mystery of a ghostly performer haunting her former venue, the gang has to pretend to be a rock band themselves!
Ash, Isabel and Helen all hope to impress cleaner and musician Jodie from Milton Keynes with their style choices.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. With Chatty in a great place and the summer holidays in full swing, Billie and Greg decide to throw a barbecue to take their mind off of things.
There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test, but Saff's decision to throw a congratulatory party for her goes wrong when she invites Junaid.
A Whine of a Time: US reality series. The ladies head to the Toronto Carnival in Canada and Porsha has a few things to get off her chest before the festivities begin.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part One: US reality series. The ladies of Beverly Hills reunite to work through hurt feelings and shocking allegations on the heels of a tumultuous year.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel, and Amy and Jordan host an intervention for Harry and Saff.
The Intervention: Reality series. Dawn Ward is back in Cheshire and jumping out of a plane. Sheena hosts a perfume launch that gets fiery when Lystra confronts Rachel.
Living on the Edge: US reality series. NeNe receives a frosty reception when she arrives in Toronto. A group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Two: US reality series. The 14th series reunion continues as Kyle and Dorit face off over Kyle's text to PK and put more strain on their friendship.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Les Dennis, Rebecca Sarker, and Jordan Stephens all trying to 'say what they see' for their chosen charity.
Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.
A State of Confusion: US cooking competition. There's a clash of culinary identities as the chefs are tasked with blending two distinct US state delicacies into one harmonious dish.
The Chicken or the Meg: Anarchic animated sitcom. Meg dates a chicken that she meets on a reality dating show and decides to move out when Peter disapproves of their relationship.
HBO-No: Anarchic animated sitcom. The Griffins present their versions of Game of Thrones, Succession, and Big Little Lies, three shows broadcast by the US cable network HBO.
The Birthday Bootlegger: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's new boss bans his favourite part of work - office birthdays - and Stewie gets detention and turns rough.
The Curious Case of the Old Hole: Wheels and the Legman hunt the people who ruined Steve's secret swimming hole, and Klaus helps an ageing Principal Lewis.
Epic Powder Dump: US animated comedy series. Stan takes his family out to replicate the ski trips from his childhood, and Klaus harbours a crush on a tech support operator.
Mission Impossi-Bob: Animated comedy. Teddy gets stuck in an underground survival bunker and calls on Bob to get him out, and Linda and the kids make a giant celebratory hamburger.
Wharf, Me Worry?: Animated comedy. The Belcher kids spend a special day with Big Bob at the Wharf that goes awry when they get into trouble with its new fortune-telling giant clam.
Stephen Mulhern hosts as a brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker in the exciting and iconic gameshow and could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. The Titans decide to go off-grid after being outraged at the prices they pay for water, gas and electricity.
Tweet Suite / Cut in Half / Desert Menu: Animated series. Sylvester gets hungry for room service when Tweety Bird goes to a hotel, and Bugs Bunny expands a buzzard's palette.
Aliens Among Us: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. The gang investigate Sheriff Stone's claims of aliens arriving in Crystal Cove.
Kitchen Frightmare: Animated adventure series. Shaggy and Scooby's favourite chef is finally opening his own restaurant when a monstrous yeti threatens the opening night!
Me, Myself and AI: Animated adventure series. The gang have to solve a computerised mystery when an artificial intelligence takes over the building of a trendy tech company.
Tucker from the East Midlands is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three single ladies.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. The Shepherds enjoy a fading summer as Nelly goes to pony camp, Arthur dislikes his school uniform, and Billie stresses about a surprise makeover.
Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel, and Amy and Jordan host an intervention for Harry and Saff.
Living on the Edge: US reality series. NeNe receives a frosty reception when she arrives in Toronto. A group trust exercise forces the ladies to live on the edge.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Two: US reality series. The 14th series reunion continues as Kyle and Dorit face off over Kyle's text to PK and put more strain on their friendship.
Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show as three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles and compete to win a 3,000-pound prize.
Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.
All Bark and Plenty of Bite: Reality series. Ampika throws a glamorous charity night for her furry friends, but defences amongst the group lead to trouble.
The Reunion: Reality series. The Housewives join host Brian Dowling on the sofa and debate the twists and triumphs of the milestone 10th anniversary series.
Snake Bye: Porsha receives a surprise from ex-fiance Dennis, and Kenya, Kandi and Porsha wonder who is responsible for the alleged recording of Cynthia.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The 14th series reunion concludes as Sutton and Dorit continue to go head-to-head and Kyle explores the end of her marriage.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Chris Bisson, Ruth Madeley, and Ardal O'Hanlon all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton hosts as accountant John, primary school teacher Jess, and care home assistant Paris all get spinning the wheel to try to take home a massive 50,000 pounds.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.
Hell's Chicken: US cooking competition. The chefs face a tough critic when tasked with elevating a classic Southern staple, and communication breakdowns threaten dinner service.
Dog Is My Co-Pilot: Anarchic animated sitcom. Brian and Quagmire go on a press tour after successfully landing a plane, and Chris and Stewie open a boutique pizza place.
Hard Boiled Meg: Anarchic animated sitcom set in Rhode Island. Meg becomes a getaway driver, and when Quagmire is unable to cure his hiccups, he asks Peter to kill him.
The Fatman Always Rings Twice: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in Rhode Island. Peter does a noir-style investigation of Meg's disappearance.
Gold Top Nuts: US animated comedy series. The Smiths return from a difficult and quarrelsome holiday, only to end up on a desert island with no memory of who they are.
